title: Smoothee's Elytra Dragon
description:
It's a simple texture that makes your elytra look better.
This texture changes elytra visuals only.
Optifine required!
body:
**
Minecraft Texture to make your Elytra looks better, this texture changes elytra visuals only.
**

It's a simple texture that makes your elytra look better.
*Optifine required!*

You can choose the color by using anvil: - Open Anvil - Rename the Elytra to "(color name) dragon elytra" all In Lowercase ### Color Available - blue - brown - cyan - green - orange - pink - purple - red - white - yellow
